_comment: Saturn session state — updated by the agent at start and end of each 4-hour session.
_session_23_note: Session 23 (2026-05-26): MRVL held in event_queue (earnings tonight May 27 post-close — cannot run DCF). Fell back to rotation: ANET deep session. Key new data: Q1 10-Q $8.9B non-cancellable purchase commitments (+31% from Q4); 52-week lead times confirmed; 1-2 year supply constraint duration. Anthropic $200B Google Cloud commitment (5yr/5GW) captured. ALAB Computex 2026 (June 2-5) added as upcoming catalyst. Phase 1b gated (23%3=2); Phase 1c gated (23%6=5). No DCF. Next session (24): MRVL post-earnings DCF is the absolute priority — take MRVL from event_queue, search Q1 FY2027 results, update story_narrative, run python3 valuation/dcf_model.py MRVL. Also: Phase 1b gate open (24%3=0) — podcast search required. Phase 1c gated (24%6=0 → open!). Samsung vote result likely announced by next session.

event_queue.event: Q1 FY2027 earnings on 2026-05-27 (post-close). Consensus $2.41B revenue / $0.80 EPS; options pricing ~13% move. ATH $196.33 close (May 22). Citi $215, Melius $220, Stifel $210, Wolfe $210. Custom ASIC $1.5B in FY2026, guiding >20% YoY FY2027, doubling FY2028. Session 23: still pending (earnings tonight). Post-earnings priority: search results, update story_narrative, run DCF. Current IV $119.91 is pre-guide stale — expect significant model revision.
